title: Elemental Frenzie
body:
This mod includes:

Lazer ore, armor, tools, and iron handle, required to make lazer things!
Iceout ore, armor, and tools!
Fire ore, armor, and tools!
Ivy forest, wood, which can Brew into a poison potion, turn into poison nuggets, and the poison nuggies cAn turn into poiSon tools.

Lazer Sword (The Lazer Saber) applies Speed to attacker and attack-ee
Fire Sword (The Torch) sets attackees on fire!
Ice Sword is the opposite of the Lazer Saber, except the attacker doesn't get slowness.
Ivy Sword obviously inflicts poison.

The armor sets are practically the same as normal armor, but better because they're asthetically pleasing!
